API
const totaldataleague = document.querySelector("#total-league-data");
// $('#datefilter').daterangepicker({ // autoUpdateInput: false, // locale: { // cancelLabel: 'Clear' // } // }); // $('#datefilter').on('apply.daterangepicker', function(ev, picker) { // $(this).val(picker.startDate.format('MM/DD/YYYY') + ' - ' + picker.endDate.format('MM/DD/YYYY')); // $('#clearDateBtn').show(); // filterRankList(); // }); // $('#datefilter').on('cancel.daterangepicker', function(ev, picker) { // $(this).val(''); // $('#clearDateBtn').hide(); // filterRankList(); // }); // $('#clearDateBtn').click(function() { // $('#datefilter').data('daterangepicker').setStartDate(moment()); // $('#datefilter').data('daterangepicker').setEndDate(moment()); // $('#datefilter').val(''); // $(this).hide(); // filterRankList(); // }); function filterRankList(statusFilter) { var tab_filter_text = $("#tab_filter_text").val().toLowerCase().trim(); if (tab_filter_text !== "" || statusFilter) { try { var temp_array = rankList.filter(function (object) { if (object) { const status = getStatus(object.start_league_date, object.end_league_date).toLowerCase(); const matchesStatus = statusFilter ? status === statusFilter.toLowerCase() : true; return ( (object.league_name && object.league_name.toLowerCase().includes(tab_filter_text)) || (object.short_league_name && object.short_league_name.toLowerCase().includes(tab_filter_text)) || (object.start_league_date && object.start_league_date.toLowerCase().includes(tab_filter_text)) || (object.end_league_date && object.end_league_date.toLowerCase().includes(tab_filter_text)) ) && matchesStatus; } return false; }); array = temp_array; } catch (error) { console.error(error); array = rankList; } } else { array = rankList; } current_index = 1; displayIndexButtons(); } function filterRankList(statusFilter) { var tab_filter_text = $("#tab_filter_text").val().toLowerCase().trim(); var datefilter = $('#datefilter').val().trim(); var startDate, endDate; if (datefilter !== '') { var dates = datefilter.split(' - '); startDate = moment(dates[0], 'DD/MM/YYYY').toDate(); endDate = moment(dates[1], 'DD/MM/YYYY').toDate(); } // Filter array based on text input, status filter, and date range var temp_array = rankList.filter(function (object) { if (object) { const status = getStatus(object.start_league_date, object.end_league_date).toLowerCase(); const matchesStatus = statusFilter ? status === statusFilter.toLowerCase() : true; const objectStartDate = moment(object.start_league_date, 'DD/MM/YYYY').toDate(); const objectEndDate = moment(object.end_league_date, 'DD/MM/YYYY').toDate(); const matchesDate = datefilter !== '' ? (objectStartDate >= startDate && objectEndDate <= endDate) : true; const matchesSearch = ( (object.league_name && object.league_name.toLowerCase().includes(tab_filter_text)) || (object.short_league_name && object.short_league_name.toLowerCase().includes(tab_filter_text)) || (object.start_league_date && object.start_league_date.toLowerCase().includes(tab_filter_text)) || (object.end_league_date && object.end_league_date.toLowerCase().includes(tab_filter_text)) ); return matchesSearch && matchesStatus && matchesDate; } return false; }); array = temp_array; // Assign filtered array back to main array current_index = 1; displayIndexButtons(); // Update pagination and display filtered results } $(document).ready(function () { // Search input event handler $('#tab_filter_text').on('input', function () { filterRankList(); // Trigger filtering when search text changes }); // Date range picker configuration and event handling $('#datefilter').daterangepicker({ autoUpdateInput: false, locale: { cancelLabel: 'Clear', format: 'DD/MM/YYYY' } }); $('#datefilter').on('apply.daterangepicker', function (ev, picker) { $(this).val(picker.startDate.format('DD/MM/YYYY') + ' - ' + picker.endDate.format('DD/MM/YYYY')); $('#clearDateBtn').show(); filterRankList(); // Trigger filtering when date range is applied }); $('#datefilter').on('cancel.daterangepicker', function (ev, picker) { $(this).val(''); $('#clearDateBtn').hide(); filterRankList(); // Trigger filtering when date range is cleared }); $('#clearDateBtn').click(function () { $('#datefilter').val('start & end date'); $(this).hide(); filterRankList(); // Trigger filtering when clear button is clicked }); // Status dropdown event handling $('#statusDropdown').change(function () { var status = $(this).val().toLowerCase(); filterRankList(); // Trigger filtering with selected status }); // Initial call to fetch data // fetchData(); // Uncomment if needed }); function filterRankList() { var tab_filter_text = $("#tab_filter_text").val().toLowerCase().trim(); var datefilter = $('#datefilter').val().trim(); var statusFilter = $('#statusDropdown').val() ? $('#statusDropdown').val().toLowerCase() : ''; var startDate, endDate; if (datefilter !== '' && datefilter !== 'start & end date') { var dates = datefilter.split(' - '); startDate = new Date(dates[0]); endDate = new Date(dates[1]); } var filteredArray = rankList.filter(function (object) { var matchesText = true, matchesStatus = true, matchesDate = true; if (tab_filter_text !== '') { matchesText = (object.league_name && object.league_name.toLowerCase().includes(tab_filter_text)) || (object.short_league_name && object.short_league_name.toLowerCase().includes(tab_filter_text)) || (object.start_league_date && object.start_league_date.toLowerCase().includes(tab_filter_text)) || (object.end_league_date && object.end_league_date.toLowerCase().includes(tab_filter_text)); } if (statusFilter !== '') { const status = getStatus(object.start_league_date, object.end_league_date).toLowerCase(); matchesStatus = (status === statusFilter); } if (datefilter !== '' && datefilter !== 'start & end date') { matchesDate = (new Date(object.start_league_date) >= startDate && new Date(object.end_league_date) <= endDate); } return matchesText && matchesStatus && matchesDate; }); array = filteredArray; current_index = 1; displayIndexButtons(); } // Function to get status based on start and end dates function getStatus(start_date, end_date) { var currentDate = new Date(); var startDate = new Date(start_date); var endDate = new Date(end_date); if (endDate < currentDate) { return "completed"; } else if (startDate > currentDate) { return "upcoming"; } else { return "running"; // Consider ongoing leagues here; adjust as needed } }
